# Plan Quality Checklist: Exportar Relatorios

**Purpose**: Validate whether the feature specification, implementation plan, data model and contracts are complete, clear, consistent and ready for task generation.
**Created**: 2026-07-04
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) and [plan.md](../plan.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are the exportable report categories fully enumerated or intentionally delegated to the existing Relatorios category RPC? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Plan §Scale/Scope]
- [x] CHK002 Are the required data fields for each complete report category defined enough to distinguish preview data from export detail data? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Data Model §Report Payload]
- [x] CHK003 Are PDF and CSV output contents specified for both executive summary and detailed rows across all initial categories? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008a/FR-008b, Contracts §Edge Rendering Rules]
- [x] CHK004 Are history fields sufficient to support category, format, period, status, requester, generation date and expiration date without relying on deprecated `arquivo_url`? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Data Model §Derived Read Model]
- [x] CHK005 Are requirements defined for legacy `Indisponível` records so they remain understandable without being confused with new failed or expired exports? [Completeness, Data Model §Compatibility, Frontend Contract §History Table]
- [x] CHK006 Are requirements documented for categories added after the initial Financeiro/DRE/Clientes/Projetos scope? [Gap, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Scale/Scope]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK007 Is "relatorio completo" quantified with minimum content, grouping and detail expectations per category? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008/FR-008a]
- [x] CHK008 Is the 12-month maximum period defined with an exact comparison rule for date ranges, including inclusive start/end semantics? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005a, Data Model §Export Period]
- [x] CHK009 Is "download imediato" defined clearly enough to distinguish signed URL return, browser download start and file generation completion? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, Edge Contract §Action gerar]
- [x] CHK010 Are signed URL lifetimes specified separately from the 12-month business validity period? [Clarity, Spec §FR-021, Storage Contract §Signed URL Policy]
- [x] CHK011 Are the personas named consistently across spec, plan and audit matrix, including Visualizador as read-only and Comercial/Tecnico as blocked for export? [Clarity, Spec §FR-015/FR-017, Audit Contract §Persona Matrix]
- [x] CHK012 Are user-facing error messages specific enough for invalid period, oversized period, permission denial, expired file, no data and generation failure? [Clarity, Spec §FR-020, Frontend Contract §Error Messages]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK013 Are frontend validations and backend/RPC validations aligned for format, dates, period length, category and capability? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003/FR-005/FR-018, Frontend Contract §UX Requirements, RPC Contract §iniciar_exportacao_relatorio]
- [x] CHK014 Are history visibility rules consistent between user stories, functional requirements, RPC listing and download authorization contracts? [Consistency, Spec §US2/FR-019a/FR-019b, RPC Contract §listar_exportacoes_relatorios/autorizar_download_exportacao_relatorio]
- [x] CHK015 Is the status model consistent between stored statuses, display statuses and UI states? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013/FR-023, Data Model §Status Lifecycle]
- [x] CHK016 Are failure handling requirements consistent between the Edge Function, Storage contract and database status lifecycle? [Consistency, Spec §FR-014, Edge Contract §Action gerar, Storage Contract §Failure Handling]
- [x] CHK017 Is the "CSV" requirement consistently represented as a ZIP delivery when both summary and details exist? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002a/FR-008b, Storage Contract §File Names]
- [x] CHK018 Are direct table access expectations consistent with the RPC-first architecture described in the plan and data model? [Consistency, Plan §Constitution Check, Data Model §RLS and Access Rules]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK019 Can the 10-second immediate download target be objectively measured for "volumes operacionais comuns"? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [x] CHK020 Are the "4 interacoes principais" in the user journey defined clearly enough to be assessed during review? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006]
- [x] CHK021 Are success criteria mapped to the personas and history scopes they claim to validate? [Traceability, Spec §SC-008/SC-009, Audit Contract §Persona Matrix]
- [x] CHK022 Are criteria for "arquivo vazio sem contexto" and "resultado compreensivel" specified enough for no-data exports? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007/SC-010, Edge Contract §Rendering Rules]
- [x] CHK023 Are CSV package success criteria traceable to concrete artifact names and tabular structure? [Traceability, Spec §SC-012, Storage Contract §ZIP contents]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK024 Are primary generation scenarios covered for Admin, Financeiro and Projetos across PDF and CSV formats? [Coverage, Spec §US1, Audit Contract §Persona Matrix]
- [x] CHK025 Are re-download scenarios covered separately from new generation scenarios, including permission re-check at download time? [Coverage, Spec §US2/FR-019, Edge Contract §Action download]
- [x] CHK026 Are read-only scenarios covered for Visualizador without implying export capability through route access? [Coverage, Spec §US3/FR-024]
- [x] CHK027 Are direct-call/bypass scenarios documented for users attempting export or download outside the UI? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, RPC Contract §autorizar_download_exportacao_relatorio]
- [x] CHK028 Are recovery scenarios specified for partial failure after the history row is created but before upload or DB completion succeeds? [Coverage, Edge Contract §Action gerar, Storage Contract §Failure Handling]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Are boundary cases for start date equal to end date and exactly 12 months included or excluded explicitly? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-005/FR-005a, Data Model §Export Period]
- [x] CHK030 Are duplicate exports for the same category, period and format intentionally allowed in both requirements and data model? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Plan §Scale/Scope]
- [x] CHK031 Are expired exports specified as visible but non-downloadable without requiring immediate physical deletion from Storage? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-013, Storage Contract §Retention]
- [x] CHK032 Are no-data cases specified for both PDF and CSV ZIP outputs with headers/context? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Edge Contract §Rendering Rules]
- [x] CHK033 Are category permission mismatches covered for generation and historical download, including old records created before permission changes? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018/FR-019, RPC Contract §autorizar_download_exportacao_relatorio]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK034 Are security requirements complete for JWT validation, service role containment, private Storage, RLS and no public permanent links? [Security, Spec §FR-021, Plan §Constraints, Edge Contract §Authentication]
- [x] CHK035 Are privacy requirements documented for report file contents, requester visibility and Admin-only cross-user history? [Security/Privacy, Spec §FR-019a/FR-019b, Data Model §RLS and Access Rules]
- [x] CHK036 Are performance expectations bounded for common volumes and future degradation paths if Edge Function execution exceeds the target? [Performance, Spec §SC-001, Research §Decision 7]
- [x] CHK037 Are accessibility and responsive requirements for the export modal, date inputs, status badges and history actions specified or intentionally deferred? [Gap, Frontend Contract §UX Requirements]
- [x] CHK038 Are observability requirements for generation errors, storage failures and audit trails specified beyond storing `erro` in the history row? [Gap, Data Model §New/changed fields, Storage Contract §Failure Handling]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK039 Are assumptions about feature 007 capabilities documented with enough dependency timing to avoid implementing export before RBAC guards are available? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Technical Context]
- [x] CHK040 Are Supabase CLI version assumptions and upgrade expectations clear enough for the implementation environment? [Dependency, Plan §Environment Notes]
- [x] CHK041 Are library choices for PDF and ZIP described as decisions, constraints or still-open implementation choices? [Dependency, Plan §Primary Dependencies]
- [x] CHK042 Are Storage bucket creation, policies and signed URL behavior traceable to migration/task requirements? [Dependency, Storage Contract §Bucket/Storage RLS]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK043 Is "categoria permitida para persona" defined by a canonical source, or does the plan need a matrix/lookup contract? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-018, RPC Contract §iniciar_exportacao_relatorio]
- [x] CHK044 Is it clear whether Admin history shows requester identity for all rows and whether Financeiro/Projetos ever see requester columns for own rows? [Ambiguity, Frontend Contract §History Table]
- [x] CHK045 Is the legacy RPC deprecation path precise enough to prevent the frontend from continuing to use `solicitar_exportacao_relatorio` accidentally? [Ambiguity, RPC Contract §Legacy RPC]
- [x] CHK046 Are cleanup/retention expectations clear enough to avoid conflict between "valid for 12 months" and optional physical deletion later? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-012/FR-013, Storage Contract §Retention]

## Validation Results

**Validated**: 2026-07-04
**Result**: 46 of 46 checkpoints passed.

### Resolved Items

- CHK001-CHK003/CHK007: Spec and data model now define exportable categories and category-level complete report content for Financeiro, DRE, Clientes and Projetos.
- CHK008/CHK029: Period semantics now state inclusive dates, same-day export allowed, `2026-01-01` to `2026-12-31` allowed and `2026-01-01` to `2027-01-01` blocked.
- CHK019: "Volumes operacionais comuns" now means up to 5,000 detailed rows or 10 MB before compression.
- CHK024: Audit contract now requires PDF and CSV coverage for each export-capable persona.
- CHK037: Frontend contract now specifies keyboard, focus, Escape, labels, non-color-only status and 320px responsive behavior.
- CHK038: Data model and Edge contract now specify observability fields and events.
- CHK041: Plan/research now fix `pdf-lib`, `fflate` and internal CSV serializer as implementation decisions.
- CHK043: Data/RPC contracts now define the exportable category policy and helper/RPC expectation.
- CHK044: Frontend contract now defines requester visibility by profile.
- CHK045: RPC contract now selects the legacy deprecation path and removes the re-route option.
